rules.description: Adds numerators AND denominators when adding fractions (1/2+1/3=2/5)
rules.hint: If you cut a roti into 2 slices and another into 3 slices, are the slices the same size?

rules.description: Multiplies numerators and denominators correctly but forgets to simplify
rules.hint: Can you divide both the top and bottom numbers by the same number?

rules.description: Compares fractions by comparing numerators only, ignoring denominators
rules.hint: If you have 3 slices from a pizza cut into 4 pieces, and 5 slices from a pizza cut into 8 pieces, who has more pizza?

rules.description: Finds fraction of a quantity by dividing instead of multiplying
rules.hint: When finding 2/3 of 12, do you multiply or divide? Try thinking step by step.

rules.description: Converts mixed numbers to improper fractions incorrectly
rules.hint: For 2 1/3, remember: multiply the whole number by the denominator, then add the numerator.
